MasterPrompt.title: Master Prompt
MasterPrompt.description: A system instruction template for the AI generator.

name.description: The name of the prompt template.

content.description: The full text of the master prompt.

isActive.description: Whether this prompt is currently active.

Generation.title: Generation
Generation.description: A set of generated scene prompts based on a script.

script.description: The input script provided by the user.

promptId.description: The ID of the master prompt used for this generation.
